task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the URL bar showing 'cameochemicals.noaa.gov' or the CAMEO Chemicals homepage is clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Look up the ERG guide numbers for Chlorine and Propane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Chemicals search results or chemical datasheets for Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) and Propane (CAS 74-98-6).

task_completion.description: Look up the ERG guide numbers for Anhydrous Ammonia, Sulfuric Acid, and Acetone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the CAMEO Chemicals search results or chemical datasheets for Anhydrous Ammonia (CAS 7664-41-7), Sulfuric Acid (CAS 7664-93-9), and Acetone (CAS 67-64-1).

task_completion.description: Create the output text file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open saving a file, or terminal commands show the creation of 'erg_guide_numbers.txt' specifically in the '~/Desktop' or '/home/ga/Desktop' directory.

task_completion.description: Format the text file correctly with one chemical per line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the text file show lines formatted exactly with the pattern 'Chemical Name | ERG Guide Number' (e.g., 'Chlorine | 124').

task_completion.description: Include all five chemicals with their correct ERG guide numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains all five chemicals with the following numbers: Chlorine (124), Propane (115), Anhydrous Ammonia (125), Sulfuric Acid (137), and Acetone (127).

integrity.description: The agent used the specified CAMEO Chemicals website to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser history, tabs, or active windows show interaction with 'cameochemicals.noaa.gov' rather than a general search engine or hallucinating the answers.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the file to the Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'erg_guide_numbers.txt' is visible on the Desktop GUI, or a save dialog/terminal command confirms the file was written to the Desktop directory, not just kept in an unsaved editor buffer.

integrity.description: The agent gathered the data from the website rather than relying on pre-existing knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a clear visual progression of searching for the chemicals on the CAMEO website before the final text file is populated with the correct numbers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct ERG guide numbers are: Chlorine = 124, Propane = 115, Anhydrous Ammonia = 125, Sulfuric Acid = 137, Acetone = 127. The expected output file location is ~/Desktop/erg_guide_numbers.txt (or /home/ga/Desktop/erg_guide_numbers.txt). The format must be exactly 'Chemical Name | ERG Guide Number'.
